text:
Roadmap fit is explicit and proximate. `UniversalCovers/README.md` Stage 0.1 names #31576 (*discreteness of homotopy-class fibres*) — delivered by `SemilocallySimplyConnected.lean` (`Path.Homotopic.Quotient.instDiscreteTopology`, the `SemilocallySimplyConnectedSpace` class). Stage 0.2 names #38292 and asks specifically for "`BasedPath x₀` and the path-component machinery of `endpoint ⁻¹' U`" — delivered verbatim by `BasedPath.lean`. The prelude vendors pending-Mathlib API (`subpathOn`, `codRestrict`, partition lemmas, `of_trans_symm`) consumed by those two files, attributed.

Single topic: the three files form one dependency stack (Prelude → SemilocallySimplyConnected → BasedPath), all on the path to the single universal-cover target. The PR stops at the prerequisite infrastructure (no `UniversalCover` quotient/`proj`/`IsCoveringMap` yet), which is exactly the "build the missing prerequisites" the roadmap invites. The prelude is net-new vendored declarations, not an opportunistic refactor of existing code bundled in.

TAUCETI-VERDICT-e21cd7f3ea152369101b68f2

```json
{
  "verdict": "approve",
  "summary": "Ports Stage 0.1 (#31576, discreteness of homotopy-class fibres / SLSC typeclass) and Stage 0.2 (#38292, BasedPath space and endpoint-preimage path components) named explicitly in the UniversalCovers roadmap, plus a prelude vendoring pending-Mathlib API. The three files are one coherent prerequisite dependency stack toward the single universal-cover target.",
  "findings": []
}
```

verdict_obj.summary: Ports Stage 0.1 (#31576, discreteness of homotopy-class fibres / SLSC typeclass) and Stage 0.2 (#38292, BasedPath space and endpoint-preimage path components) named explicitly in the UniversalCovers roadmap, plus a prelude vendoring pending-Mathlib API. The three files are one coherent prerequisite dependency stack toward the single universal-cover target.
